areas.snap_selector: body > div:nth-of-type(2) > div.bili-feed4 > div.bili-header.large-header > div:nth-of-type(3) > div.channel-icons

key_elements_identified_from_screenshot.purpose: Two-row grid of rounded pill-shaped category links for content filtering
Orange circular icon linking to user's dynamic/activity feed
Pink/coral circular icon linking to trending/popular content
Secondary navigation links (专栏, 活动, 社区中心, 直播, 课堂, 新歌热榜) on the right side
Large featured content carousel/banner with anime artwork, navigation dots, and prev/next arrows
3×2 grid of video recommendation cards with thumbnails, stats overlay, titles, and author info
Video cover image with rounded corners (6px), duration overlay, and gradient stats bar at bottom
Bottom gradient overlay on thumbnails showing play count, danmaku count, and duration in white text
Video title text in dark color below thumbnail
Author name with UP icon and date, in gray text below title
换一换 (refresh) button on far right for loading new video recommendations
Light gray (#f1f2f3) page background visible at edges

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Two-row grid layout of content category links allowing users to filter by genre

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: display:grid, gap:10px, padding:0 140px, background-color:rgb(255,255,255), height:120px, to_relevant_elements: contains all category-link pills in 2 rows, positioned below header banner

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Individual category pill button with rounded border for content genre navigation

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: color:rgb(97,102,109), background-color:rgb(246,247,248), border:1px solid rgb(241,242,243), border-radius:6px, font-size:14px, font-weight:400, height:30px, width:~74px, text-align:center, display:flex, align-items:center, justify-content:center, font-family:'PingFang SC' system-ui sans-serif, to_relevant_elements: arranged in 2-row grid with 10px gap, 14 items per row

element_details.text_content: 番剧, 国创, 综艺, 动画, 鬼畜, 舞蹈, 娱乐, 科技数码, 美食, 汽车, 体育运动, vlog, 电影, 电视剧, 纪录片, 游戏, 音乐, 影视, 知识, 资讯, 小剧场, 时尚美妆, 动物

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Expandable dropdown to show additional category links beyond the visible grid

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: color:rgb(97,102,109), font-size:14px, width:76px, height:30px, displays '更多' text with down arrow icon, to_relevant_elements: positioned at end of category grid row 2

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Orange circular icon button linking to user's activity/dynamic feed

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: width:46px, height:46px, border-radius:50%, background-color:rgb(255,146,18) (orange), contains white SVG icon (25x25), to_relevant_elements: paired with popular-icon to the right, both above category grid, with '动态' label below

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Pink/coral circular icon button linking to popular/trending content

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: width:46px, height:46px, border-radius:50%, background-color:rgb(240,119,117) (coral/pink), contains white SVG icon (25x25), to_relevant_elements: paired with dynamic-icon to the left, with '热门' label below

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Text label below circular icons reading '动态' or '热门'

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: font-size:14px, color:rgb(24,25,28), text-align:center, width:46px, height:20px, to_relevant_elements: centered below its parent icon circle

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Secondary navigation links on the right side with icons (专栏, 活动, 社区中心, 直播, 课堂, 新歌热榜)

relationships_to_other_elements.relationship: positioned to the right of category grid
relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: width:258px, height:74px, display:flex, contains links with SVG icons (20x20) + text labels, to_relevant_elements: right-aligned in header channel section, opposite to category grid

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Individual right sidebar navigation link with icon and text

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: color:rgb(97,102,109), font-size:14px, display:flex, align-items:center, gap:4px, contains SVG icon (20x20) + span text, width:78px, height:32px, to_relevant_elements: arranged in 2 rows within right-sidebar-links container

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Large featured content carousel with auto-rotating slides showing featured videos/events with anime artwork

relationships_to_other_elements.relationship: positioned to the left of video grid
relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: width:565px, height:477px(total)/402px(body), border-radius:6px, overflow:hidden, background-color:rgb(241,242,243), to_relevant_elements: takes up left ~37% of content area, video cards fill the remaining ~63% to the right

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Pagination indicator dots at bottom of carousel showing current slide position

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: list of 9 circular dots (14x14px each, border-radius:50%), background transparent, margin:1px between dots, active dot uses .is-active class with filled style, to_relevant_elements: centered at bottom of carousel, above carousel arrows

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Previous/next navigation buttons for manually advancing carousel slides

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: two buttons, each 28x28px, border-radius:8px, background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1), semi-transparent white, to_relevant_elements: positioned at bottom-right of carousel body, next to pagination dots

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Individual video recommendation card containing thumbnail, stats overlay, title, and author info

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: width:273px, height:228px, background:transparent, display:flex, flex-direction:column, border-radius on cover:6px, to_relevant_elements: arranged in 3-column grid with gap, 2 rows visible, each card ~273px wide

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Video cover image with rounded corners showing a preview frame

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: border-radius:6px, overflow:hidden, aspect-ratio approximately 16:9, img covers full area with object-fit:cover, to_relevant_elements: occupies top ~65% of video-card, stats-overlay positioned absolutely at bottom of this

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Semi-transparent gradient overlay at bottom of thumbnail showing play count, danmaku count, and duration

relationships_to_other_elements.relationship: absolutely positioned at bottom of cover
relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: position:absolute, bottom:0, width:100%, height:38px, background:linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0), rgba(0,0,0,0.8)), padding:16px 8px 6px, display:flex, align-items:center, to_relevant_elements: overlays bottom of video-thumbnail, contains play-count, danmaku-count, and duration as children

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: White text showing play count (e.g., '73.1万') and danmaku count (e.g., '639') with small icons

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: color:rgb(255,255,255), font-size:13px, display:flex, align-items:center, gap:4px, each stat has SVG icon + number text, to_relevant_elements: play count on left, danmaku count in middle, duration on right within stats-overlay

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Video duration text (e.g., '00:46') displayed in stats overlay

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: color:rgb(255,255,255), font-size:13px, to_relevant_elements: right-aligned within stats-overlay, after play and danmaku counts

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Video title text displayed below the thumbnail

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: color:rgb(24,25,28), font-size:15px, font-weight:500, line-height:22px, max 2 lines with text-overflow:ellipsis, to_relevant_elements: positioned below video-thumbnail, above video-author-info

element_details.text_content: 越 看 越 好 看 ~ / 没人在我就这样.. / "当你再次想起我时，你还会选择我吗" / "人民叫师" / 专研之路 / 第一视角解锁顶配梦境...

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: color:rgb(148,153,160), font-size:13px, display:flex, align-items:center, contains UP icon SVG + author name + date string, to_relevant_elements: last element in video-card info section, below video-title

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: 换一换 (refresh/change) button to load new video recommendations

relationships_to_other_elements.relationship: positioned to the far right of grid
relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: color:rgb(24,25,28), font-size:16px, background:transparent, positioned at x:1593 y:282, contains refresh icon + '换一换' text vertically, to_relevant_elements: right edge of content area, vertically centered relative to video cards

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: White background container for the header channel section

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: background-color:rgb(255,255,255), padding:0 140px, height:120px, to_relevant_elements: wraps the entire category navigation + icons section

discovered_elements.purpose_of_the_element: Light gray page background visible around content sections

relationships_to_other_elements.mimic_tips: to_element_itself: background-color:rgb(241,242,243), to_relevant_elements: visible as edge color around white content sections
